commands.review_summary:
The branch splits subagent registry lazy imports into three stable runtime entries, keeps the legacy broad runtime entry, adds source/build coverage, and lazily imports the legacy context-engine compaction delegate.

PR surface: Source +14, Tests +44, Other +3. Total +61 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a performance/refactor PR, not a bug report with a failing current-main reproduction path. Source inspection confirms current main still uses one broad subagent-registry runtime import surface.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Remaining action is maintainer review plus contributor runtime proof, not a narrow mechanical code repair for ClawSweeper to apply.

target.title: perf: split subagent registry runtime imports
target.body:
## Summary

- Split the subagent registry lazy runtime imports across three narrower runtime entries: `context-engine-init.runtime`, `context-engine-registry.runtime`, and `runtime-plugins.runtime`.
- Keep the existing `subagent-registry.runtime` build entry for live-update compatibility, but stop new subagent-registry code from loading that broad runtime surface.
- Lazy-load the legacy context-engine compaction delegate only when `LegacyContextEngine.compact()` is invoked.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.config.ts src/agents/subagent-registry.runtime-imports.source.test.ts src/infra/tsdown-config.test.ts`
- `node scripts/tsdown-build.mjs`
- `node scripts/runtime-postbuild.mjs && wc -c dist/context-engine-init.runtime.js dist/context-engine-registry.runtime.js dist/runtime-plugins.runtime.js dist/subagent-registry.runtime.js`
- `pnpm lint`
- `git diff --check`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: subagent registry callers no longer pay the single broad `subagent-registry.runtime` lazy import when they only need context-engine initialization, context-engine resolution, or runtime plugin loading.

Real environment tested: local OpenClaw source checkout on `origin/main` commit `57e0bdaabe`, with this patch applied.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: ran the focused Vitest command above, a full tsdown build, runtime postbuild, `pnpm lint`, and `git diff --check`.

Evidence after fix: the focused Vitest run passed `3` files / `21` tests; `tsdown-build` exited `0`; runtime postbuild exited `0`; emitted stable entry sizes were `119` bytes for `context-engine-init.runtime.js`, `605` bytes for `context-engine-registry.runtime.js`, `120` bytes for `runtime-plugins.runtime.js`, and `318` bytes for the retained compatibility `subagent-registry.runtime.js`; `pnpm lint` exited `0`.

Observed result after fix: split stable runtime entries are emitted and survive runtime postbuild; the subagent registry source imports the narrower runtime specs instead of `SUBAGENT_REGISTRY_RUNTIME_SPEC`.

What was not tested: full test suite, live gateway update survivor flow, and live subagent E2E.
